data.title: Katten and Four Attorneys Win Citywealth Powerwomen USA Awards
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Katten revealed that Joshua S. Rubenstein, the Private Wealth Global Chair, along with Partners Ronni G. Davidowitz, Bonnie Lynn Chmil, and Kathryn von Matthiessen, were honored with Citywealth's Powerwomen USA Awards. This recognition highlights their exceptional contributions to the industry, emphasizing their expertise and leadership. The awards reflect the significant achievements of these individuals within the wealth management sector, underscoring their ongoing commitment to excellence.

data.title: IBA Launches myQAMatriXXAiR to Advance Patient‑Specific QA in Particle Therapy
data.description: A new wireless ionization chamber array has been developed for particle therapy PSQA, providing fast and dependable verification for proton and carbon ion treatments. This technology supports growing techniques like FLASH and ARC radiotherapy, increasing efficiency in delivering treatments.

data.title: Nicholas Webb Unveils New Research on the Future of Healthcare, Highlighting Human Experience as the Key to Growth and Workforce Stability
data.description: Renowned healthcare keynote speaker Nicholas Webb, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, highlighted three significant trends impacting the industry on March 20, 2026. Webb, a prominent figure in innovation and future trends, addressed key changes reshaping the healthcare sector. With his expertise, he shed light on crucial developments affecting the industry's trajectory.

data.title: Nationally Recognized SBA Business Valuation Firm Highland Global Joins ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic as Corporate Partner
data.description: Highland Global, a well-established business valuation firm with over 20 years of experience in SBA loan valuations, has enhanced its local engagement by becoming a corporate partner of the 2026 ONEflight Myrtle. Known for its expertise in the SBA 7(a) lending sector, Highland Global is widely respected for its thought leadership in this field.

data.title: DITA Lancier Receives IOFT 2026 Technology Award for Innovative Hidden U-Fork Hinge
data.description: DITA Lancier has recently revealed its Fall Collection for 2025, showcasing the innovative Hidden U-Fork Hinge. This groundbreaking feature has received acclaim, winning the Technology Award at the 2026 International Optical Fair Tokyo specifically for the LSA-141 model. The hinge incorporates a concealed 1mm space which enhances performance.

data.title: Thailand Good Travel Recognizes 41 Model Destinations and Tourism Operators Advancing Toward International Standards
data.description: The Thailand Good Travel Sustainable Tourism Certification Ceremony was organized by the Department of Tourism in the Ministry of Tourism and Sports. This event was part of the THAILAND GREEN PLAN 2030 initiative and highlighted the theme "Champions of Change: Showcasing Models of Transformation Toward Sustainability." At the ceremony, a total of [number] tourism enterprises were recognized for their commitment to sustainable practices. This initiative aims to promote sustainability and responsible tourism in Thailand, aligning with the country's goals outlined in the THAILAND GREEN PLAN 2030.

data.title: Spas of America Unveils the 2026 Spa Collection Across North America
data.description: Explore a handpicked collection of top-tier spa and wellness retreats throughout North America. Vancouver, British Columbia saw the debut of the 2026 Spa Collection by Spas of America on March 20, 2026. This exclusive compilation features exceptional independent spas and wellness havens across the region.

data.title: Novatio Deploys AI-Powered Adjudication Assistant to Help Utah Modernize Unemployment Claims Processing
data.description: An AI-powered solution has been implemented to streamline the fact-finding process for claimants and provide adjudicators with structured insights to expedite the processing of unemployment claims. This development was revealed by Novatio Solutions in Orlando, Florida on March 20, 2026. The AI solution aims to significantly reduce the time taken to process claims, potentially benefiting a large number of individuals seeking unemployment assistance.

data.title: Iconic South of Broad Home Sells for $10 Million - The Historic Chisolm-Alston House, One of Charleston's Most Distinguished Residences, Finds Its Next Steward
data.description: In Charleston, S.C., a significant sale took place on March 20, 2026, as the Chisolm-Alston House located at 172 Tradd Street was sold for $10 million on the historic peninsula. The property was successfully sold by Robertson Allen of The Cassina Group.

data.title: Memori Labs Outperforms Every Other Memory System with 81.95% Accuracy at 4.98% the Cost of Full Context
data.description: The development of "Memori: A Persistent Memory Layer for Efficient, Context-Aware LLM Agents" has shown that its structured memory architecture surpasses all other retrieval-based memory systems on the LoCoMo long-conversation memory benchmark. Impressively, Memori achieved an overall accuracy of 81.95% on LoCoMo, showcasing its efficiency and effectiveness in handling complex memory tasks.

data.title: Low Institute for Therapeutics Announces the Passing of Founder Dr. Philip Low; Accelerates Commitment to Advance His Life's Mission of Alleviating Human Suffering
data.description: Dr. Philip Low, co-founder and chairman of the Low Institute for Therapeutics (LIFT), passed away on March 4, 2026. LIFT was created by Dr. Low to advance his dedication to minimizing human suffering. Following his passing, LIFT has intensified its efforts under the direction of Stewart to uphold its mission.

data.title: Burrell College Celebrates 165 Residency Matches for the Class of 2026
data.description: On March 21, 2026, in Las Cruces, New Mexico, the Burrell College of Osteopathic Medicine marked a significant occasion as 165 student physicians successfully matched into various medical specialties for their residencies on Match Day. This milestone was lauded as a defining moment for these students, showcasing their dedication and potential in the medical field.

data.description: Michael Saylor's company has acquired an impressive quantity of Bitcoin. Let's examine how Strategy managed to accumulate this substantial amount.

data.title: GardePro Launches World's First 3,000ft (1km) Long Range Wireless Trail Camera, Breaking WiFi Distance Limits
data.description: In the latest update, it was reported that GardePro, a leading developer in outdoor smart monitoring solutions, has introduced the GardePro Link 1.0 Long-Range Wireless Trail Camera System, consisting of the Hub and R3 Pro trail camera. This cutting-edge system utilizes advanced 802.11ah long-range wireless technology to enhance monitoring capabilities.

data.title: Retired HK individual scammed $840K by 'crypto experts' thrice in 6 months with false promises of gains and recovery.
data.description: Police in Hong Kong reported that a retiree, aged 66, fell victim to fraudulent schemes three times within a span of six months. The swindlers, posing as "crypto investment experts," lured the victim with promises of quick profits and assistance in recouping previous losses.

Brent above 110 puts pressure on both inflation and growth. Even if inflation moves toward 2.25% to 2.5%, the question is whether that overshoot is large enough to prompt a policy response after recent undershoots.

data.title: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich Hosts 43rd Annual Dallas Rhinoplasty Meeting in Dallas, Advancing Global Rhinoplasty Education
data.description: Renowned plastic surgeon Dr. Rod J. Rohrich will be leading the 43rd Annual Dallas Rhinoplasty Meeting from March 20 to 22, 2026, in Dallas. The event will showcase leading global experts in the field and will include live demonstrations along with practical surgical training sessions. The meeting, held in Dallas on March 21, 2026, will provide valuable insights and updates in rhinoplasty techniques, attracting a wide audience of medical professionals and enthusiasts.

data.title: Some malls thriving despite challenging retail climate; 25% showing growth in foot traffic and 15% increase in sales.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global population has reached 7.8 billion people, with an estimated 3.6 billion individuals now having access to the internet. This means that nearly half of the world's population is connected online. The report also highlighted that 2.4 billion people are active users of social media platforms. The increasing connectivity has had significant implications for various aspects of society, including communication, business, and education. As technology continues to advance, it is expected that these numbers will continue to grow, further shaping the way people interact and engage with the world.

data.title: Bitcoin's mining difficulty drops by 7.7%, marking the second significant decrease in 2026 amidst growing AI data center competition.
data.description: The mining difficulty of Bitcoin recently experienced its second significant reduction in 2026. This adjustment will make it easier for miners to compete as they face increasing competition from AI data centers.
